body: TCA SLEEP INITIATED -- 2026-06-30T23:10:06Z. MT4: not running. MetaEditor: not running. All processes already closed, nothing to detach. Triggering sleep now via SetSuspendState directly (skipping the SendKeys shortcut attempt -- it relies on desktop focus that a background-spawned process can't reliably guarantee, SetSuspendState is the deterministic path). Note: this will also suspend the relay-listener.ps1 scheduled task and this CronCreate watchdog until the machine wakes -- that's expected, not a bug. Next session boot after wake will re-arm everything per bootup-recall.
